helpful: provisioned snapshot (contained the full docket including the disposition)
statpack modern discretionary-cert base-rate table (anchored the counterfactual pre-decision estimate)
provisioned BIO text (showed respondents contested the vehicle, not reviewability)
gaps: a provisioning-time guard that checks whether the specific event being predicted (not just the case) already reads resolved in the snapshot — this forward cell's petition-disposition outcome was sitting in the baseline
notes: No MCP/REST/corpus retrieval used: the snapshot already stated the petition disposition, so retrieval could add nothing permissible.
